goal: continue building without manual actions until completion or ecosystem-managed task handoff is capable

tasks.title: Install entity runtime source tree
tasks.done_when: src, tests, scripts, docs, schema, example, and CI exist in live branch

tasks.title: Run managed completion and entity runtime verifier in CI
tasks.done_when: GitHub Actions verifies managed completion state, entity runtime tests, and runnable demo

tasks.title: Open install PR with boundary statement
tasks.done_when: PR exists, states non-production boundary, and has been merged

tasks.title: Recalculate live repo delta
tasks.done_when: live branch verification confirms entity runtime source, tests, docs, schema, examples, and CI are present

tasks.title: Mirror queue status into GitHub issue
tasks.done_when: GitHub issue mirrors task queue and points back to repository source of truth

tasks.title: Define activation milestone map
tasks.done_when: repo contains a staged activation map from local entity runtime to StegTalk messaging prototype
